mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO service_order_member_snapshot( order_id, team_id, member_id, role_code_snapshot, display_name_snapshot, job_title_snapshot, avatar_url_snapshot ) SELECT #{orderId}, r.team_id, m.id, r.role_code, m.display_name, m.job_title, m.avatar_url FROM agency_team_publisher_rel r JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = r.member_id WHERE r.team_id = #{teamId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT s.order_id AS orderId, s.member_id AS memberId, s.display_name_snapshot AS displayName, s.avatar_url_snapshot AS avatarUrl, s.job_title_snapshot AS jobTitle, s.role_code_snapshot AS roleCode, CASE WHEN r.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS reviewed FROM service_order_member_snapshot s LEFT JOIN agency_member_review r ON r.order_id = s.order_id AND r.member_id = s.member_id AND r.status != 'DELETED' WHERE s.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY CASE s.role_code_snapshot WHEN 'CONSULTANT' THEN 1 WHEN 'PLANNER' THEN 2 WHEN 'WRITER' THEN 3 WHEN 'APPLY_SPECIALIST' THEN 4 WHEN 'VISA_SPECIALIST' THEN 5 WHEN 'AFTERCARE' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END, s.member_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agency_member_review( order_id, student_user_id, org_id, team_id, member_id, role_code_snapshot, professional_score, communication_score, material_score, transparency_score, responsibility_score, overall_rating, nps_score, comment_text, anonymous, status ) SELECT #{orderId}, #{studentUserId}, o.org_id, o.team_id, s.member_id, s.role_code_snapshot, #{professionalScore}, #{communicationScore}, #{materialScore}, #{transparencyScore}, #{responsibilityScore}, #{overallRating}, #{npsScore}, #{commentText}, #{anonymous}, 'APPROVED' FROM service_order o JOIN service_order_member_snapshot s ON s.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND s.member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS memberId, m.display_name AS displayName, m.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, m.job_title AS jobTitle, tr.role_code AS roleCode, COALESCE(SUM(r.overall_rating), 0) AS reviewSum, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(r.overall_rating), 2), 0) AS avgRating, COUNT(r.id) AS reviewCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.overall_rating >= 4.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS positiveCount, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.overall_rating >= 4.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 2), 0) AS positiveRate, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(NULLIF(TRIM(r.comment_text), '') ORDER BY r.created_at DESC SEPARATOR ' / '), ' / ', 2) AS keywordSummary FROM agency_team_publisher_rel tr JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = tr.member_id LEFT JOIN agency_member_review r ON r.member_id = m.id AND r.status = 'APPROVED' WHERE tr.team_id = #{teamId} AND tr.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY m.id, m.display_name, m.avatar_url, m.job_title, tr.role_code ORDER BY CASE tr.role_code WHEN 'CONSULTANT' THEN 1 WHEN 'PLANNER' THEN 2 WHEN 'WRITER' THEN 3 WHEN 'APPLY_SPECIALIST' THEN 4 WHEN 'VISA_SPECIALIST' THEN 5 WHEN 'AFTERCARE' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END, m.id ASC

SELECT r.id AS reviewId, r.member_id AS memberId, CASE WHEN r.anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名学生' ELSE COALESCE(sp.name, '学生') END AS studentName, r.overall_rating AS overallRating, r.professional_score AS professionalScore, r.communication_score AS communicationScore, r.material_score AS materialScore, r.transparency_score AS transparencyScore, r.responsibility_score AS responsibilityScore, r.nps_score AS npsScore, r.comment_text AS commentText, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM agency_member_review r LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.user_id = r.student_user_id WHERE r.team_id = #{teamId} AND r.member_id = #{memberId} AND r.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status_code IN ('ADMITTED', 'REJECTED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS outcomeCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status_code = 'ADMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS admittedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status_code = 'ADMITTED' AND s.qs_rank IS NOT NULL AND s.qs_rank <= 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS highQualityOfferCount FROM service_order o LEFT JOIN student_application_list a ON a.user_id = o.student_user_id LEFT JOIN program p ON p.id = a.program_id LEFT JOIN school s ON s.id = p.school_id WHERE o.team_id = #{teamId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID'

SELECT COUNT(st.id) AS totalStages, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN st.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completedStages, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN st.student_feedback IS NOT NULL AND st.student_feedback != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejectedStages, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS totalOrders, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN o.id END), 0) AS completedOrders FROM service_order o LEFT JOIN student_service_case c ON c.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN service_stage st ON st.case_id = c.id WHERE o.team_id = #{teamId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID'

SELECT o.verification_status AS orgVerificationStatus, COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS totalMembers, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN vr.status = 'APPROVED' OR m.verified_badge_status = 'APPROVED' THEN m.id END), 0) AS approvedMembers, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM refund_request rr JOIN service_order so ON so.id = rr.order_id WHERE so.team_id = t.id AND rr.status IN ('REQUESTED', 'APPROVED') ), 0) AS refundCount FROM agency_team t JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = t.org_id LEFT JOIN agency_team_publisher_rel tr ON tr.team_id = t.id AND tr.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = tr.member_id AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN verification_record vr ON vr.user_id = m.user_id AND vr.verify_type = 'AGENT_MEMBER_CERT' WHERE t.id = #{teamId} GROUP BY t.id, o.verification_status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agency_rating_summary( scope_type, scope_id, team_id, org_id, member_id, total_score, student_review_score, offer_outcome_score, process_performance_score, platform_trust_score, review_count, positive_rate, confidence_label ) VALUES( #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, #{teamId}, #{orgId}, #{memberId}, #{totalScore}, #{studentReviewScore}, #{offerOutcomeScore}, #{processPerformanceScore}, #{platformTrustScore}, #{reviewCount}, #{positiveRate}, #{confidenceLabel} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE team_id = VALUES(team_id), org_id = VALUES(org_id), member_id = VALUES(member_id), total_score = VALUES(total_score), student_review_score = VALUES(student_review_score), offer_outcome_score = VALUES(offer_outcome_score), process_performance_score = VALUES(process_performance_score), platform_trust_score = VALUES(platform_trust_score), review_count = VALUES(review_count), positive_rate = VALUES(positive_rate), confidence_label = VALUES(confidence_label)
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM agency_team WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT m.id AS memberId, m.display_name AS displayName, m.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, m.job_title AS jobTitle, COALESCE(pr.role_code, '') AS roleCode, COALESCE(SUM(r.overall_rating), 0) AS reviewSum, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(r.overall_rating), 2), 0) AS avgRating, COUNT(r.id) AS reviewCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.overall_rating >= 4.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS positiveCount, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.overall_rating >= 4.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 2), 0) AS positiveRate, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(NULLIF(TRIM(r.comment_text), '') ORDER BY r.created_at DESC SEPARATOR ' / '), ' / ', 2) AS keywordSummary FROM agency_member_profile m LEFT JOIN agency_member_role_rel pr ON pr.member_id = m.id AND pr.is_primary = 1 AND pr.role_status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_review r ON r.member_id = m.id AND r.status = 'APPROVED' WHERE m.org_id = #{orgId} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY m.id, m.display_name, m.avatar_url, m.job_title, pr.role_code ORDER BY reviewCount DESC, avgRating DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT 20
